warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A stalwart fighter with high HP and defense.

rogue.name: Rogue
rogue.description: A nimble striker who bleeds enemies and slips past blows.

mage.name: Mage
mage.description: A glass cannon wielding devastating elemental magic.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A precise hunter who marks prey and picks it off.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: A holy warrior who smites foes and mends wounds.
